claims.claim: For 27 Ah NCM/graphite polymer lithium-ion cells, the maximum internal pressure increases monotonically with SOC: 0.14 MPa at 25% SOC, 0.29 MPa at 50% SOC, 0.53 MPa at 75% SOC, and 1.39 MPa at 100% SOC.
claims.quote: The maximum internal pressure is 1.39 MPa for 100% SOC, 0.53 MPa for 75% SOC, 0.29 MPa for 50% SOC and 0.14 MPa for 25% SOC, respectively.

claims.claim: For 27 Ah NCM/graphite polymer lithium-ion cells under external heating, the maximum heat release rate increases from 1.45 kW at 50% SOC to 4.38 kW at 75% SOC to 5.54 kW at 100% SOC without secondary ignition, and rises sharply to 73.3 kW at 100% SOC with secondary ignition.
claims.quote: The maximum heat release rates are 5.54 kW, 4.38 kW and 1.45 kW for the cell SOC of 100%, 75% and 50%, respectively... While the heat release rate of the 100% SOC cell with SI increases sharply with a maximum value of 73.3 kW

claims.claim: The maximum venting rate increases with SOC from 0.9 m/s at 25% SOC to 7.2 m/s at 100% SOC, and the 100% SOC cell with secondary ignition exhibits a higher maximum venting rate of 9.4 m/s.
claims.quote: As the SOC rises, the maximum venting rate increase from 0.9 m/s to 7.2 m/s. And the 100% SOC cell with a SI device exhibits a higher maximum venting rate of 9.4 m/s.

claims.claim: The cell with 25% SOC did not exhibit violent venting behavior or thermal runaway under external heating, with a maximum average surface temperature of only 90°C and a maximum temperature rate of 0.66°C/s.
claims.quote: For the 25% SOC cell, the maximum average surface temperature is only close to 90°C, which is unable to trigger the violent thermal runaway. And the maximum temperature rate is about 0.66°C/s, which is usually regarded as a sign of thermal runaway onset

claims.claim: The FED (fractional effective dose) value for asphyxiant gas toxicity increases with SOC: 0.002 at 25% SOC, 0.022 at 50% SOC, 0.029 at 75% SOC, and 0.033 at 100% SOC.
claims.quote: The maximum FED values corresponding to the cell with a SOC ranging from 100% to 25% are 0.033, 0.029, 0.022 and 0.002.
